subcodes.first_line: My spirit be sacrificed for thy steadfastness! This evanescent servant hath been honored with the receipt of thy noble letter and epistle [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: روحی لاستقامتک الفداء قد تشرف الخادم الفانی بزیاره کتابکم الشریف و خطابکم
subcodes.subjects: @true liberty; freedom, @wisdom [hikmat], @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @critique of Western values; culture, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
